messages.subject: [R-jobs] Seeking employment in SF Bay area
messages.subject_clean: [R-jobs] Seeking employment in SF Bay area
messages.body_plain:
Dear all,

I've recently relocated to the San Francisco Bay area and am seeking full- or part-time employment anywhere in the Bay area. I am a recent PhD graduate and have academic postdoctoral research experience, mostly in bioinformatics and computational biology. I am extremely proficient in R and Bioconductor, and have experience with Java, Q/KDB+, MATLAB, and GTK. I'm a native English speaker, US citizen, and also have great presentation skills.

If interested, please email me for a current resume. 

Thanks!


_________________________________________________________________


owitworks_012009
	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]

messages.subject: [R-jobs] Compiling an R consultant directory
messages.body_plain:
R-jobs listers,

I recently started an R programming resources website.  There is an "R
consultants" directory on the site that users can use to locate and contact R
consultants or contractors when they have R based work.  If you or  
your organization has expertise in R and would like to be listed in  
this directory, I invite you to visit the site and register.  It is  
completely free.

The link is:

http://www.programmingr.com

If you or your organization would like additional (free) publicity on  
the site, you're welcome and encouraged to participate in forum  
discussions or let me know that you're interested in writing a guest  
article.

Best,
Bryan

messages.subject: [R-jobs] Searching for R programmer in India, New Delhi
messages.subject_clean: [R-jobs] Searching for R programmer in India, New Delhi
messages.body_plain:
Hello

The National Institute for Public Finance and Policy is looking to hire 
someone for the month of March 2009.

The project is in time series econometrics (threshold cointegration with 
package tsDyn)  and involve computer intensive methods, so external help 
is needed for overall code optimisation, involving:
- parallel work (set-up of a small cluster),
-rewritting pieces of code from R to C of Fortran
-set-up of algorithms for matrix computations.

As current applications concern financial markets, people with knowledge 
in finance or econometrics are also welcome to apply. This job can 
possibly lead to a longer term engagment at the institute for other 
projects in case of satisfactory work.

Matthieu Stigler

messages.subject: [R-jobs] New Bioinformatics Position with R Programming
messages.subject_clean: [R-jobs] New Bioinformatics Position with R Programming
messages.body_plain:
We currently have a new contract position open with a large Pharmaceutical
company. The details are below. If you have interest please contact me,
Christina Kinchen at 800-684-9921 ext 80670. 

The successful candidate will work in close partnership with laboratory
scientists and IS/IT professionals to define and deliver informatics
projects of benefit to the drug discovery and development
process.?????????????????????????????????? 

Requirements:
MS, Ph.D. or equivalent experience in computer science or engineering with
at least 2 years work experience at a pharmaceutical or biotech company.?
The successful candidate will have recent experience interacting with
Biologists or Chemists to develop and support scientific applications.?
Excellent business analysis skills and demonstrated ability to work as part
of a development team are essential.? Recent J2EE, Oracle and XML experience
with working knowledge of the full software development lifecycle is
required.? Programming and web design in bioinformatics with computational
methods for text-mining (PERL or R) and knowledge engineering a plus.
Excellent communication skills are essential.



****************************************************************************
*******
Christina Kinchen
Senior Recruiter
Smith Hanley Consulting Group, LLC
an inVentiv Health Company (NASDAQ:VTIV)
accelerate results
www.smithhanleyconsulting.com
"Ask About Our Referral Policy"
1st Placement- $1000
2nd Placement-$2000
3rd Placement-$3000
?
Click to search current job opportunities

-Specializing in contract placement of Statisticians, SAS Programmers,
Clinical Data Managers/Data Coordinators, and other clinical professionals
throughout the US.

Phone 800-684-9921 ext 80670

Fax 888-513-4285

the listed email address. Thank You.
